# Best Substack Alternatives 2026 - Full Comparison

## Summary

Comprehensive 2026 comparison of all major newsletter platforms as Substack alternatives. Provides a ranked table with audience ownership scores, starting prices, free plan availability, and verdict ratings. Published May 2026 - most current comparative source in research.

## Quick picks matrix (May 2026)

| Tool | Best For | Starting Price | Free Plan | Audience Ownership | Rating |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Beehiiv | Modern owner-audience with growth | $34/month | Yes (2.5K subs) | ★★★★★ | 9.0/10 |
| Ghost | Self-hostable open-source | $9/month | Yes (self-host) | ★★★★★ | 8.7/10 |
| Kit | Creator-focused with automation | $25/month | Yes (1K subs) | ★★★★★ | 8.4/10 |
| Buttondown | Writer-first simple | $9/month | Yes (100 subs) | ★★★★★ | 8.1/10 |
| MailerLite | Budget-friendly email marketing | $9/month | Yes (1K subs) | ★★★★★ | 7.9/10 |
| Substack | Network-effects discovery | Free + 10% | Yes | ★★★☆☆ | varies |

## Decision framework by use case

- **Growth tools with full audience ownership**: Beehiiv (strongest direct Substack replacement)
- **Self-hostable open-source**: Ghost (maximum platform ownership, 0% fees)
- **Creator automation + landing pages**: Kit (mature automation, 100+ integrations)
- **Writer-first simplicity**: Buttondown ($9/month unlimited subscribers)
- **Budget newsletter features**: MailerLite ($9-10/month, solid automation)
- **SaaS lifecycle email**: Loops (transactional + marketing unified)
- **Discovery and network effects**: Substack (still best organic discovery for new writers)

## Beehiiv's key differentiators vs Substack (2026)

1. Full audience ownership (export subscribers at any time)
2. 0% revenue share on paid subscriptions (vs 10% for Substack)
3. Built-in referral programs, boosts, recommendation network
4. Native ad network for monetization from day one
5. Advanced analytics (UTM tracking, subscriber segmentation)
6. Email automations (Substack does not have this)
7. Custom domain without one-time $50 fee (vs Substack's $50 one-time charge)

## Ghost 2026 status

- Open-source: free to self-host (hosting costs separate)
- Ghost Pro managed hosting: from $9/month (Starter, 500 members)
- 0% transaction fees (direct Stripe connection)
- Self-hosting on own server: no platform fees at all
- Strong SEO capabilities; "built as a simpler WordPress" - web-first, email bolted on
- No native referral or ad network growth tools
- Requires bringing your own audience

## Annotations for stinger-forge

- This is the most current (May 2026) comprehensive comparison source.
- The audience ownership ★★★★★ ratings for Beehiiv, Ghost, Kit, Buttondown vs Substack's lower rating is key to the "own your list" argument.
- Buttondown ($9/month, unlimited subscribers) is a notable omission from the Command Brief's platform list - it belongs as a footnote for minimalist/developer-oriented users who don't need growth tools.
- The "start on Substack, migrate to Beehiiv" pattern is confirmed: "many successful creators begin here [Substack] and graduate to Beehiiv or Ghost later."
- Ghost Pro pricing note: updated - $9/month Starter (500 members), scales up to $199/month Business.
